items.title: Dow surpasses 53K; sets new closing record after holiday weekend
items.content: Dow Jones Industrial Average finished at a record high above 53,000 on July 6, while weakness in chip and technology stocks weighed on the Nasdaq.

items.title: Dow slips below 53,000; Nasdaq drops 1% as chip stocks tumble and oil spikes
items.content: Dow closed at 52,925.15 (-0.25%), S&P 500 at 7,503.85 (-0.45%), Nasdaq Composite at 25,818.69 (-1.16%). Chip stocks led declines.

items.title: Hong Kong stocks surge 3% as tech giants Alibaba, SMIC lead rally
items.content: Hang Seng Index finished up 3%. Hang Seng Tech Index surged ~5% to 4,731. Zhipu AI +13.4%, Alibaba +12%, Xiaomi +9%. Lock-up expiry concerns eased.

items.title: Hong Kong Hang Seng rocketed 5.8% to 24,208.83
items.content: Hang Seng surged 1,327.81 points (+5.8%) to close at 24,208.83, its biggest single-day gain in recent history.

items.title: US PCE price index expected to rise 0.5% MoM in May, accelerating from April
items.content: PCE expected to accelerate from 0.4% to 0.5% MoM in May as higher energy costs from Iran conflict continue to feed through.

items.title: Measurement tweaks will make inflation data look better
items.content: Core PCE inflation at 3.4% for 12 months ended May, above Fed's 2% target every month since March 2021.

items.title: May PCE report: Headline at 4.07% YoY, 3-month annualized pace at 6.28%
items.content: Headline PCE inflation at 4.07% year-over-year. Annualized pace over past 3 months at 6.28%, reflecting accelerating inflation pressure.

items.title: US and Iran reach initial agreement to open Strait of Hormuz, extend ceasefire
items.content: US and Iran reached initial agreement to open Strait of Hormuz and further extend shaky ceasefire, allowing desperately needed oil and gas to reach global market.

items.title: China, Hong Kong stocks gain as chip, AI rally lead rebound
items.content: CSI Semiconductor Index rallied 4.1%, CSI AI Index jumped 3.9%. Macquarie says now is 'best time' to buy Chinese AI chip stocks.

items.title: Samsung, SK Hynix shares tumble over 9% as chip rout spreads
items.content: SMIC Hong Kong shares fell more than 11%. Chip rout spread from Wall Street to Asia. Samsung and SK Hynix both declined over 9%.

items.title: AI-tied stocks rebound; Dow closes at record after crossing 53K
items.content: Major indexes ended Monday higher. AI-tied stocks rebounded. Dow closes at record after crossing 53,000 for the first time.

items.title: Citi upgrades TSMC; predicts over 30% revenue growth for 2026
items.content: Citi upgraded TSMC price target to NT$3,800, citing over 30% revenue growth for 2026 despite some caution on broader AI investment trends.
